fields: Stochastic thermodynamics (TUR) × Bacterial cell biology (adder model)

final_hypotheses.title: FtsZ GTPase ~2000× Over-Dissipating vs DnaA — Precision Bottleneck at Initiation Not Division
final_hypotheses.bridge: GTPase vs ATPase molecular current comparison — informational vs structural dissipation
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: FtsZ84 at semi-permissive temp → CV_added unchanged; dnaA46 → CV_added +15-30%. Asymmetric response identifies precision bottleneck.
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: All key parameters independently verified. Clean paired falsification test. Direction robust to parameter uncertainty (>800× even at lowest estimates).

final_hypotheses.title: Variance-Component Decomposition of E. coli Adder — DnaA Counting Dominant at Fast Growth
final_hypotheses.bridge: TUR variance decomposition of adder noise into independently bounded components
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: CV²_counting > 50% of CV²_total at fast growth (>1.5 dbl/hr); phase transition to C+D-dominated at 0.8-1.0 dbl/hr.
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: Novel two-regime model. Three independent test protocols. Risk: Genthon 2026 extrinsic noise dominance may make intrinsic decomposition experimentally unresolvable.

final_hypotheses.title: ppGpp → Supercoiling → N_eff Reduction as Stress-Responsive TUR Tuning
final_hypotheses.bridge: DNA topology (supercoiling) as modulator of effective N_eff in the counting TUR
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: During stringent response, CV_added increases from ~10% to ~14-17%. DnaA overexpression does NOT prevent this increase (sites inaccessible, not protein shortage).
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: 3-step mechanistic chain independently verified (ppGpp → supercoiling → I/τ-site binding). Clean discriminating test. Risk: cooperative DnaA filament assembly may undermine independent-site N_eff model.

final_hypotheses.title: RIDA Kinetic Timing Window — U-Shaped CV vs Hda Titration
final_hypotheses.bridge: RIDA kinetic timing window: rate-accuracy tradeoff with bidirectional sensitivity
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: U-shaped CV_added vs Hda titration. Both 0.1× and 10× Hda increase CV above WT optimum. Not predicted by Landauer or simple counter-reset models.
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: U-shaped prediction is uniquely discriminating. Risk: RIDA dispensability (PNAS 2024) weakens premise; Maduike 2014 citation unverifiable.

final_hypotheses.title: TUR Dominates Berg-Purcell for DnaA-oriC — Thermodynamic Not Diffusive Bottleneck
final_hypotheses.bridge: TUR vs Berg-Purcell dual-bound comparison for same molecular sensor
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: TUR floor (9.5%) exceeds BPL floor (0.9-3.3%) by 3-10×. Increasing DnaA mobility cannot improve adder precision.
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: Highly novel — no prior TUR vs BPL comparison for same biological system. Primary experiment fatally flawed (DnaA L366K cannot initiate). Secondary tests valid. Must redesign experimental handle.

final_hypotheses.title: Multi-Current TUR Decomposition — Noise Portfolio
final_hypotheses.bridge: Multi-current coupled TUR decomposition with per-subsystem efficiency ratios
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: DnaA at ~1.1× TUR floor (informational), MinCDE at ~25× (structural), FtsZ at ~50× (mechanical). Hierarchy: informational tasks near-optimal, structural far above.
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: Novel noise portfolio concept. Individual calculations verified. Risk: independence assumption unjustified (DnaA-FtsZ STRING 0.920), Genthon 2026 extrinsic noise dominance threatens experimental measurability.

final_hypotheses.title: Min Pareto-Frontier TUR with Pattern Instability Bifurcation
final_hypotheses.bridge: Min Pareto-frontier TUR with pattern instability above critical MinD density
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: U-shaped σ_z/L vs MinD titration. Minimum at WT MinD density. Bifurcation point C* coincides with precision loss onset.
final_hypotheses.quality_gate_notes: TUR Pareto-frontier extends Fei & Bhatt 2015. Quantitative predictions novel. Citation error on Barato & Seifert 2017 (PRX 2016, not PRL 2017). Qualitative U-shape direction partially published.

excluded.title: DnaA-ATP Membrane-Affinity Gradient — Pole-Biased Origin Firing
excluded.reason: MECHANISM IMPLAUSIBLE: DnaA diffusion (D~3 μm²/s) homogenizes spatial gradient in <1s. Péclet number ~0.002. Same physics killed C2-H4.
